flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Cornish College of the Arts are 47% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($33.7k vs $63.3k).

flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.1% at Cornish College of the Arts exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($20.6k debt amortized over 10 years vs $33.7k earnings).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cornish College of the Arts rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.5k → $41.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cornish College of the Arts rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.5k → $41.7k).
